diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,31 +1,28 @@
 # Model definition

 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

-from transformers import CLIPVisionModel, CLIPVisionConfig

+import torchvision.models as models

 

 class SatelliteClassifier(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_classes=62):

         super().__init__()

-        # Load only the vision model component of CLIP

-        self.vision_model = CLIPVisionModel.from_pretrained('openai/clip-vit-base-patch16')

+        # Use a pre-trained ResNet50 as backbone

+        self.backbone = models.resnet50(pretrained=True)

         

-        # Freeze the vision model parameters to avoid unexpected keys issue

-        for param in self.vision_model.parameters():

-            param.requires_grad = False

+        # Replace the final classification layer

+        num_features = self.backbone.fc.in_features

+        self.backbone.fc = nn.Identity()  # Remove the original classifier

         

-        # Add classification head

+        # Add our custom classifier

         self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(self.vision_model.config.hidden_size, num_classes)

+            nn.Dropout(0.5),

+            nn.Linear(num_features, 512),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.3),

+            nn.Linear(512, num_classes)

         )

         

     def forward(self, x):

-        # Get features from CLIP vision encoder

-        outputs = self.vision_model(pixel_values=x)

-        sequence_output = outputs.last_hidden_state

-        

-        # Take [CLS] token (first token)

-        pooled_output = sequence_output[:, 0, :]  # Take [CLS] token

-        

-        logits = self.classifier(pooled_output)

-        return logits
+        features = self.backbone(x)

+        output = self.classifier(features)

+        return output
